publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2019-12-03 00:13:44 +0000.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.abstract: Court orders and files relating to the Lambda Legal Defense and Education Fund's pioneering work on second parent adoption. Included are files on: second parent adoption, other adoption cases, co-parenting cases, and domestic partners. Also, files on marital status discrimination, health, sodomy laws, violence, and a federal civil rights law.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

defitem.label: EAD encoding:
defitem.item: Andrea HektorPeter Martinez, Dec. 2003Lara Blas and Sara McDermott, June 2010

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: Ettelbrick served as staff attorney and then legal director of the Lambda Legal Defense and Education Fund from 1986-1993. She went on to leadership positions at the National Gay and Lesbian Task Force, the International Gay and Lesbian Human Rights Commission, and the Stonewall Community Foundation. She was born October 2, 1955 and died October 7, 2011.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Court orders and files relating to the Lambda Legal Defense and Education Fund's pioneering work on second parent adoption, a legal principle that makes it possible for the same sex partner of a parent to become the legal second parent. Included are files on: second parent adoption, other adoption cases, co-parenting cases, and domestic partners. Also, files on other lesbian and gay rights issues that Ettelbrick focused on while working with Lambda Legal Defense and Education Fund, including marital status discrimination, health, sodomy laws, violence, and a federal civil rights law.

separatedmaterial.head: SEPARATED MATERIAL
separatedmaterial.p: The following periodicals have been removed from the collection and catalogued individually:
Agenda. New York: 1998: Spring, Summer, Fall/Winter (2).
Edge Newsletter: Education in a Disabled Gay Environment. 1988:v.2no. 1.
Empire State Pride Agenda Quarterly Update. 1990: December. 1991: Winter.
FAIRPAC Quarterly Update. 1988: Winter. 1989: Spring. 1990: Fall-Spring; special election issue: Oct. 1990.
Lesbian Her story Archives Newsletter 10. 1988: February.
Pride Agenda Members Update. 1993: Spring. 1995: Summer.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Paula L. Ettelbrick papers, #7644. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
